chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI S.C.R.A. No. 432 & 433 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ HEARING CASE / PRIORITY. 1) For orders on office objection No. 20. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For hearing of CMA No. 3662/2022. 23.05.2025. Mr. Tahir Khalil holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Applicant. Mr. Sajid Latif, Advocate for Respondent. ______________ As per bailiff’s report, notice stands duly served and received by one Mr. Zafar on behalf of the Respondent but nobody has tuned up. Notice stands duly served. No further notice required. Respondent shall be proceeded Ex-parte and the Applicant’s Counsel assist the Court on the next date. Office to place copy of this order in connected file. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
